title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow Once
scenario: Location permission dialogue reappears with Allow Once/Allow while using app/Don't Allow options after granting location via Find My Device flow with Ask Next Time setting
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding with "Don't Allow" selected for location permissions.
4. Observe the location permission popup displayed with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
6. Observe navigation to the phone's system settings for location permissions.
7. Grant location permission with the option "Ask Next Time or When I Share".
8. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Observe the "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" dialogue displayed with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't Allow".
expected: After granting location permission with \"Ask Next Time or When I Share\" and returning to the app, the \"Allow Poly Lens to use your location\" dialogue should appear with options \"Allow Once\", \"Allow while using app\", and \"Don't Allow\".
